return(function(J,b,x,s,v,K,l,i,k,V,c,a,R,A,j,B,q,o,Q,n,L,W,X)L,q,c,i,j,X,k,B,A,a,R,V,o,W,n,Q=function(J,D)local b=k(D)local x=function()return q(J,{},D,b)end return x end,function(q,x,s,v)local mU,S,QU,tU,w,JU,d,xU,vU,Z,c,nU,I,G,sU,SU,g,BU,e,j,C,O,KU,p,N,z,qU,XU,uU,FU,m,pU,t,T,MU,h,TU,u,zU,r,kU,RU,YU,UU,E,l,eU,F,PU,bU,GU,P,iU,y,AU,WU,NU,DU,Y,hU,k,EU,jU,lU,V,aU,VU,oU,OU,wU,H,f,LU,M,i,dU,gU,U,cU,CU,ZU
